omitted_declarations.policy_reference: TicketSwap offers social features to make your experience on our platform more personal and interactive. When you use these social features and add the following information, we process the following personal data based on your consent: • Profile Information: You may choose to provide profile information such as your username, bio, profile picture, and your favorite artists or events you are following. • Following and Followers: You can follow other users or be followed by them. You can control whether your profile is public or only visible to approved followers. • Visibility of Activities: Depending on your privacy settings, other users may see which artists and events you follow.
